repo.title: GitHub - carbon-design-system/carbon: A design system built by IBM · GitHub

manifest_entry.name: Carbon Design System
teaches: how a design system scales across teams
avoid: bringing enterprise weight into simple landing pages
assuming more components always means better product UX
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: Useful for learning system rigor and large-scale frontend discipline.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: System quality comes from governance and consistency, not sheer component count.
